head.title: ArborVista Retreat | Quiet Cabin Near Dollywood in Sevierville

meta.content: ArborVista Retreat is a quiet, private two-bedroom Smoky Mountain cabin with an open arcade loft, four beds, 2.5 baths, a private hot tub, and gated resort amenities near Dollywood, Pigeon Forge, and Gatlinburg.
meta.name: description

meta.content: A quiet, private Smoky Mountain retreat with two main-level suites, an open loft with two twin beds, a private hot tub, and resort amenities. Sleeps six.

head.script: { "@context":"https://schema.org", "@type":"VacationRental", "name":"ArborVista Retreat", "description":"Quiet and private two-bedroom vacation rental cabin with an open loft in Sevierville, Tennessee, featuring four beds, 2.5 bathrooms, a private hot tub, fireplaces, arcade games, and Shagbark Resort amenities.", "url":"https://swasamventure.github.io/TN_STR/", "image":["https://swasamventure.github.io/TN_STR/images/hero/2732PC-1.jpeg"], "address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Sevierville","addressRegion":"TN","addressCountry":"US"}, "numberOfBedrooms":2, "numberOfBathroomsTotal":2.5, "occupancy":{"@type":"QuantitativeValue","maxValue":6}, "amenityFeature":[ {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"Private outdoor hot tub","value":true}, {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"Open loft with two twin beds and arcade games","value":true}, {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"Full kitchen","value":true}, {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"High-speed Wi-Fi","value":true}, {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"Free on-site parking","value":true}, {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"Washer and dryer","value":true}, {"@type":"LocationFeatureSpecification","name":"Seasonal resort pool access","value":true} ], "sameAs":"https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/1587774879621242014" }

div.h1:
Come for the mountains.
Stay for the feeling.
div.p: A quiet, private retreat inside gated Shagbark Resort—close to Dollywood, Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg, and the national park, yet comfortably away from the crowds.

div.h2: Close to everything. Away from the crowds.

div.p: ArborVista Retreat is designed for families and couples who want a peaceful wooded setting without giving up convenient access to the Smokies’ most popular attractions.
Enjoy two private main-level suites, a playful open loft for kids and teens, an expansive deck, and evenings in your private hot tub surrounded by mountain calm.

img.alt: Bright living room at ArborVista Retreat

div.h2:
Everything for an easy,
comfortable mountain stay.

article.p: A secluded outdoor soak after a day in the Smokies.
Open loft with two twin beds, ideal for kids and teens.
King and Queen suites, each with an ensuite bathroom.
Fireplaces in the living room and both main-level suites.
Dishwasher, cookware, dishes, coffee maker, microwave, oven, refrigerator, and stove.
Reliable connectivity for streaming or remote work.
Modern entertainment throughout the cabin.
Laundry convenience for longer stays.
Off-street parking for two to three vehicles.
Central heating and air conditioning.
Outdoor dining, seating, gas grill, and wooded views.
Seasonal pool, courts, playground, trails, and more.

div.p: Select a space, then tap any image.

button.data-alt: ArborVista Retreat exterior and mountain setting

img.alt: ArborVista Retreat exterior and mountain setting

Hot tub and outdoor relaxation at ArborVista Retreat

div.h2:
Adventure by day.
Peace and privacy by night.
div.p: Explore the Smokies, then return to a quiet gated mountain setting away from downtown noise and traffic.

article.p: Dining, shopping, rides, and evening fountain shows in Pigeon Forge.
Family rides, live entertainment, crafts, and seasonal festivals.
Trails, waterfalls, scenic drives, and wildlife viewing.
Mountain-top attractions, gardens, dining, and panoramic views.
A signature mountain experience above downtown Gatlinburg.
A scenic loop featuring historic sites, streams, and trail access.
A celebrated valley loop known for wildlife and historic buildings.
A seasonal waterpark with family slides, pools, and play areas.

div.small: Hot tub and fireside evenings after

a.p: Coasters, crafts, music, and seasonal celebrations.
Dining, attractions, shops, and fountain shows.
Scenic drives, waterfalls, wildlife, and trails.
Walkable attractions, dining, and mountain views.

div.h2:
Close to the action.
Grounded in nature.
div.p: Use ArborVista Retreat as your home base for scenic drives, family attractions, mountain trails, and memorable meals throughout Sevierville, Pigeon Forge, and Gatlinburg.

img.alt: Map showing ArborVista Retreat near Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg, Dollywood, and Great Smoky Mountains National Park

div.blockquote: “This cabin has stood out among all the others we've stayed at — extremely clean and cozy, private, with a pristine hot tub and all the listed amenities.”

div.p: Check live availability, current rates, fees, and verified booking details securely on Airbnb.
div.h2: Ready to trade the crowds for mountain calm?
div.p: See live availability, current pricing, house details, and verified guest reviews directly on Airbnb.

div.a: Home in Sevierville · 2 bedrooms + open loft · 4 beds · 2.5 baths · sleeps 6

div.h2:
Clear expectations.
A better stay for everyone.

article.p: The primary guest must be at least 23 years old and remain at the property during the reservation.
No pets are permitted. Violations may result in a $500 fee and immediate removal without refund.
Smoking and vaping are prohibited inside the cabin. A $2,000 cleaning and deodorizing fee may apply.
A signed electronic rental agreement is required after booking.
The cabin accommodates no more than six overnight guests.
Travel insurance is recommended for weather, power outages, illness, and other unexpected disruptions.

details.summary: How many guests can the cabin accommodate, and what's the bed and bath layout?+
details.p: The cabin comfortably sleeps six across two main-level suites: a King suite and a Queen suite, each with a private ensuite bathroom. The open upper loft has two twin beds and arcade games, making it especially well suited for kids or teens. The cabin has 2.5 bathrooms: two full ensuite bathrooms plus one main-level half bathroom.
Yes. Free off-street parking is available on site for two to three vehicles.
No. ArborVista Retreat is a strictly pet-free home. Unauthorized pets may result in a $500 fee and immediate removal without refund.
No smoking or vaping is permitted inside the cabin. A $2,000 cleaning and deodorizing fee may apply for violations.

details.summary: Is there an age requirement to book?+
details.p: Yes. The primary guest must be 23 or older and must remain at the cabin throughout the reservation.

Guests receive complimentary access to Shagbark Resort amenities, including the seasonal community pool, pickleball and tennis courts, basketball court, playground, frisbee golf, cornhole, fitness trail, dog park, picnic pavilion, and gated entrance. The pool is generally open Memorial Day through Labor Day from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM, subject to resort operations and posted rules.

details.summary: How far is the cabin from Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg, and Dollywood?+
details.p: The Island in Pigeon Forge is about 9 miles away, Dollywood is 12 miles away, Great Smoky Mountains National Park is 14 miles away, and major Gatlinburg attractions such as Anakeesta and the SkyBridge are roughly 17 miles away.
Self check-in is provided through a personalized smart-lock code sent three days before arrival. There is no office stop or key pickup. Check-in begins at 4:00 PM and checkout is by 10:00 AM.
Yes. Strong Wi-Fi is included throughout the cabin for streaming, trip planning, and remote work.

For reservations made through Airbnb, the cancellation terms displayed during checkout and in your confirmed reservation apply. A processing fee of 3% or $75, whichever is higher, may apply where permitted. Review the full terms before booking.
Yes. A signed electronic rental agreement is sent shortly after your reservation is confirmed and must be completed before arrival.

details.summary: Where do I see current pricing and availability?+
details.p: Live nightly rates, fees, minimum-stay requirements, and open dates are always shown on the Airbnb listing, which remains the current source of truth for booking information.
